en: I have a headache.
notes: "headache" は一語。"My head hurts." でもOK

en: My stomach hurts. / I have a stomachache.
notes: "tummy" は子供っぽいので大人同士では避ける

en: I think I'm coming down with something. / I might have a cold.
notes: "coming down with" =「（病気に）かかりかけている」

en: I have a fever.
notes: "a fever" と冠詞 "a" が必要

en: I have a sore throat.
notes: "sore" =「痛い（炎症系）」。"sore throat" でセット

en: My nose won't stop running. / I have a runny nose.
notes: "runny nose" =「鼻水」

en: I feel sluggish. / My body feels heavy.
notes: "sluggish" =「だるい」にぴったり

en: I feel dizzy.
notes: "dizzy" =「めまいがする」

en: I feel nauseous. / I feel sick.
notes: "nauseous" =「吐き気がする」。"sick" はより広い意味

en: I don't have an appetite. / I'm not hungry.
notes: "appetite" =「食欲」

en: My body has been feeling heavy lately.
notes: 比喩的な「重い」は英語でもそのまま "heavy"

en: My shoulders are stiff. / I have tense shoulders.
notes: 英語に「肩こり」の一語はない。"stiff" か "tense" で表す

en: My eyes are tired. / I have eye strain.
notes: "eye strain" は長時間の画面作業で使う

en: My allergies are killing me.
notes: "killing me" =「ひどい（比喩）」。花粉症 = "hay fever" または "allergies"

en: I took some medicine.
notes: "took" =「飲んだ」。薬は "take" で「飲む」

jp: 病院行ったほうがいいかな。
en: Maybe I should see a doctor.
notes: "see a doctor"。"go to the hospital" は救急レベルのニュアンスになるので注意

en: I'm better now. / I'm all good now.
notes: "all good" =「完全に大丈夫」

en: I'm feeling a lot better.
notes: "a lot" で「だいぶ」を強調

en: I'm not fully recovered yet. / Not 100% yet.
notes: "Not 100% yet." はカジュアル

jp: 無理しないようにしてる。
en: I'm trying to take it easy.
notes: "take it easy" =「無理しない」。定番表現
